Part.Source: Event Start //######## TUDO O QUE MUDAR AQUI, DEVERÁ SER MUDADO EM popover_ProdutoFornecedor ########\\ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) // Carrega o Contexto da Sessão RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &CustoAutNiv) // Retorna as Autorizações &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod // Empresa &FilCod = &inFilCod // Filial Do 'CarregaPedido' // Carrega a Capa do Pedido PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', '#&IsDuplicadoCompra#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &padObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') Do Case Case &PadObs = '1' &IsDuplicadoCompra = true Case &PadObs = '0' &IsDuplicadoCompra = false EndCase PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() Do Case Case Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = 'A' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO //ativoInativo pq é filtro Case Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = 'I' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO //ativoInativo pq é filtro Otherwise &ProSts.SetEmpty() EndCAse EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaLinhaTam.Call(&linhaNumeric, &TamanhoNumeric) TableMain.Height = &TamanhoNumeric Grid.Rows = &linhaNumeric &ProNom = &inProNom &ProNom.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh Do 'CarregaPedido' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &EstSdo.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PadObs = &ProSts If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() PadraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) EndIF EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load //Importante carregar os procedimentos nesta ordem para não dar conflito de informações visuais\\ RetornaQuantidadeEstoque1.Call(EmpCod, &InFilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &EstCom, &EstVen, &EstPrd, &EstQtd, &EstSdo, &EstSug, &EstQtdFis, &EstMin) Do 'CarregaProdutosGrid' RetornaQuantidadePedido.Call(EmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, 0, ProCod, ProGraCod, &PedQtd) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Selecition = !'' &DetailWebComponent = !'' &StatusEstoque.FromImage(ActionDesce) &StatusEstoque.TooltipText = "" &gridProGraEstQtd = ProGraEstQtd &CustoMoeda = ProVlrCus &gridProGraEstSdo = ProGraEstSdo &EstSdo.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstSdo <= 0 , !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridEstoqTotal = &AuxEstQtd + &EstQtd //Calcula o Total em estoque (ESTOQUE + ESTOQUE DE SIMILAR) Do Case Case &GridEstoqTotal >= &GridProQtdMin //Caso o Total seja maior que a quantidade mínima &StatusEstoque.FromImage(iconVerde) //Destaca na cor Verde &StatusEstoque.Tooltiptext = 'Produto com estoque acima da quantidade mínima exigida!' Do Case Case &EstQtd < &GridProQtdMin //Caso o Total seja maior, mas o Estoque do produto seja menor que o mínimo &StatusEstoque.FromImage(iconAmarelo) //Destaca na cor amarela &StatusEstoque.Tooltiptext = 'Produto com estoque abaixo do mínimo, mas possuí estoque de similar!' Case &EstQtd = 0 And &GridProQtdMin = 0 And &AuxEstQtd = 0 //Caso o mínimo seja 0 e a quantidade em estoque também &StatusEstoque.TooltipText = 'Quantidade mínima não informada e produto sem estoque.' EndCase Otherwise &AuxEstTot = (&GridProQtdMin - &GridEstoqTotal) //Calcula quanto falta para zerar o estoque &StatusEstoque.FromImage(iconVermelho) //Destaca na cor amarela RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(Trim(ToFormattedString(&AuxEstTot)), &VarAuxEstTot) //remove os zeros depois da vírgula &StatusEstoque.Tooltiptext = 'Produto com '+Trim(ToFormattedString(&VarAuxEstTot))+' itens abaixo do Estoque mínimo exigido.' EndCase EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSeleciona' 4 If not &RetoProCod.IsEmpty() do 'GetVarCod' &WebSession.Set('ProGraRef', &OutProGraRef) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoCompra', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) WWPActions.Popover_Close(TableMain.InternalName, false) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click If &PedQtd > 0 &PedVlrUntTot = &PedVlrUnt * &PedQtd Else &PedVlrUntTot = &PedVlrUnt EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = WcDadosDoImposto.Create(EmpCod, &InFilCod, &InPedCod, &PedItmCod, &PedVlrUntTot, &PedItmAcr, &PedItmDsc, &PedItmIpi, &PedItmIcmSt, &PedItmIcmStPob, &PedItmIcm, &EstQtd, &AuxEstQtd, &GridProQtdMin, &GridProQtdMax) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom1.Visible = False &ProBar1.Visible = False &MarCod1.Visible = False &ProVarNcm1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom2.Visible = False &ProBar2.Visible = False &MarCod2.Visible = False &ProVarNcm2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom3.Visible = False &ProBar3.Visible = False &MarCod3.Visible = False &ProVarNcm3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ProdutoGrade" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &RetoProCod.IsValid if not &RetoProCod.IsEmpty() do 'GetVarCod' &WebSession.Set('ProGraRef', &OutProGraRef) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoCompra', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) WWPActions.Popover_Close(TableMain.InternalName, false) EndIF EndEvent Event &Selecition.Click &OutProGraCod = 0 &OutProCod = 0 &OutProGraRef = ProGraRef &WebSession.Set('ProGraRef', &OutProGraRef) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoCompra', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) WWPActions.Popover_Close(TableMain.InternalName, false) EndEvent Event &PedQtd.ControlValueChanged If &PedQtd > 0 and Not &PedQtd.IsEmpty() &RefreshPedidoVarchar = 'S' Do 'RetornaProdutoPedido' If &PedItmCod = 0 &sdtProdutoLote.Clear() &sdtProdutoLoteItem = New() &sdtProdutoLoteItem.PedProEstLotCod = '#SEM_LOTE' &sdtProdutoLoteItem.PedProEstLotQtd = &PedQtd &sdtProdutoLote.Add(&sdtProdutoLoteItem) Else RetornaQuantosLotesAdicionados.Call(&EmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, &PedItmCod, &InformacaoLotes, &AuxsdtProdutoLote) &sdtProdutoLote = &AuxsdtProdutoLote EndIf &sdtAddPedidoProduto = new() &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAcr = &PedItmAcr &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmDsc = &PedItmDsc &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmIpi = &PedItmIpi &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmIcmSt = &PedItmIcmSt &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmIcmStPob = &PedItmIcmStPob &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmIcm = &PedItmIcm &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedQtdEmb = &PedQtd &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedProEmbQtd = &ProForQtdEmb &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmCmp = '' &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIpiBas = &PedItmAjuIpiBas &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIcmBas = &PedItmAjuIcmBas &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIcmStBas = &PedItmAjuIcmStBas &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuPisBas = &PedItmAjuPisBas &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmPis = &PedItmPis &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmCofins = &PedItmCofins &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIcmVlr =&PedItmAjuIcmVlr &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuCofinsVlr = &PedItmAjuCofinsVlr &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIcmsStPobVlr = &PedItmAjuIcmsStPobVlr &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIcmStVlr = &PedItmAjuIcmStVlr &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuIpiVlr = &PedItmAjuIpiVlr &sdtAddPedidoProduto.PedItmAjuPisVlr = &PedItmAjuPisVlr GravaItemPedidoCompra.Call(&EmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, &PedItmCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUnt, &sdtAddPedidoProduto, &sdtProdutoLote, &inseridoMensagem, &AlteradoMensagem, &Context.UserName, 'S') &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoCompra', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) RetornaTotalLiquidoBruto.Call(&EmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, &PedVlrBrt, &PedVlrLiq) EndIf EndEvent Sub 'RetornaProdutoPedido' &AuxProCod = ProCod For Each Order (PedCod), EmpCod FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &InPedCod Where ProCod = &AuxProCod &PedItmCod = PedItmCod &PedVlrUnt = PedVlrUnt &PedItmIpi = PedItmIpi &PedItmIcmSt = PedItmIcmSt &PedItmAcr = PedItmAcr &PedItmDsc = PedItmDsc &PedItmIcmStPob = PedItmIcmStPob &PedItmIcm = PedItmIcm &PedItmAjuIpiBas = PedItmAjuIpiBas &PedItmAjuIcmBas = PedItmAjuIcmBas &PedItmAjuIcmStBas = PedItmAjuIcmStBas &PedItmAjuPisBas = PedItmAjuPisBas &PedItmPis = PedItmPis &PedItmCofins = PedItmCofins &PedItmAjuIcmVlr = PedItmAjuIcmVlr &PedItmAjuCofinsVlr = PedItmAjuCofinsVlr &PedItmAjuIcmsStPobVlr = PedItmAjuIcmsStPobVlr &PedItmAjuIcmStVlr = PedItmAjuIcmStVlr &PedItmAjuIpiVlr = PedItmAjuIpiVlr &PedItmAjuPisVlr = PedItmAjuPisVlr Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'CarregaProdutosGrid' &gridProCod = ProCod Do 'BuscaProdutoSimilar' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &gridProCod &PedItmCod = 0 &PedVlrUnt = 0 &PedItmIcmSt = 0 &PedItmIcmStPob = 0 &PedItmIcm = 0 &PedItmIpi = 0 &PedItmAcr = 0 &PedItmDsc = 0 Do 'RetornaProdutoPedido' &ProForQtdEmb = RetornaQtdEmbalagem.Udp(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod, &gridProCod) //Retorna Custo If &PedItmCod = 0 or (&LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao and &LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CadastradoFornecedor) Do Case Case &LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CadastradoFornecedor RetornaCustoFornecedor.Call(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod, &gridProCod, &PedItmIcmSt, &PedItmIcmStPob, &PedItmIcm, &PedItmIpi, &PedItmAcr, &PedItmDsc, 0, 0, &PedVlrUnt, '') Case &LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.UltimaCompraFornecedor RetornaCustoUltimaCompraProduto.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCliCod, &gridProCod, &PedItmIcmSt, &PedItmIcmStPob, &PedItmIcm, &PedItmIpi, &PedItmAcr, &PedItmDsc, 0, 0, &PedVlrUnt) Otherwise RetornaCustoUltimaCompraProduto.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, &gridProCod, &PedItmIcmSt, &PedItmIcmStPob, &PedItmIcm, &PedItmIpi, &PedItmAcr, &PedItmDsc, 0, 0, &PedVlrUnt) EndCase EndIf &GridProQtdMax = ProQtdMax &GridProQtdMin = ProQtdMin Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetVarCod' RetornaProdutoReferencia_basico.Call(&EmpCod, ProGraRef, &InOutProCod, &OutProGraCod, &mensage, &IsAchouProduto, &ErroMensagem) For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &InOutProCod &OutProGraRef = ProGraRef.Trim() Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'CarregaPedido' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &inEmpCod Where FilCod = &inFilCod Where PedCod = &inPedCod &PedCliCod = PedCliCod &PedCliRaz = PedCliCodRaz &LctTipCus = LctTipCus &LctInfPrc = LctInfPrc &PedVlrBrt = PedVlrBrt &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &PedDtaVct = PedDtaVct Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'BuscaProdutoSimilar' &AuxEstQtd = 0 prcRetornaQuantidadeEstoqueSimilares.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &GridProCod, &sdtSimilares) &AuxEstQtd = &sdtSimilares.QtdSimilar EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
